title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 10–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Toki, Zoro, Luffy as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop it!! You're making KOBY uncomfort- able!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you've still got energy to play, Luffy, then go play....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then next time we'll get the teacher to time you, along.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Our school lives are always so eventful!!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: OH NO!! Lunch time is over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I don't see a school here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wasn't there a school around here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's on the other side of the mountain.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ONE PIECE ACADEMY IS CURRENTLY SELLING FAST IN "SAIKYOU JUMP"!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 19 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
